questions.text: Best time complexity to look up by key in a Python dict?
questions.explain: Dict lookup is average O(1) due to hashing.
Stack is Last In, First Out; Queue is FIFO.

questions.text: In a binary search tree, left child is ___ than the root.
questions.explain: BST: left subtree has smaller keys, right has larger.

questions.text: What is the time complexity of merge sort?
questions.explain: Merge sort divides and merges in O(n log n).

questions.text: Which data structure uses a heap for priority?
questions.explain: A priority queue is typically implemented with a heap.

questions.text: BFS on a graph uses which auxiliary structure?
questions.explain: BFS uses a queue to process nodes level by level.
